modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to chat in a Microsoft Teams channel.

full_description_text: I'm trying to send messages in a channel on Microsoft Teams, but it's just not working. I thought it would be straightforward, but I can't figure out how to chat there. Can someone help me out with this?
short_description: Unable to chat in a Microsoft Teams channel.
description: I'm trying to send messages in a channel on Microsoft Teams, but it's just not working. I thought it would be straightforward, but I can't figure out how to chat there. Can someone help me out with this?
